nasb.text: Moses said, “By this you shall know that the Lord has sent me to do all these deeds; for this is not my doing.

esv.text: And Moses said, “Hereby you shall know that the Lord has sent me to do all these works, and that it has not been of my own accord.

cnv.text: 摩西說：“由此你們可以知道，我作這一切事，是耶和華派我作的，並不是出於我自己的心意。

ccb.text: 摩西对会众说：“你们很快就知道，我所做的事都是奉耶和华之命而行，并非出于私意。
